phrases.intent_en: When does the next Zittau bus leave?
phrases.text_local: V kolik jede další autobus do Žitavy?
phrases.cultural_note: Bus schedules are often given relative to the current time in casual conversation.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Fügnerova street entrance?
phrases.text_local: Kde je vchod z Fügnerovy ulice?
phrases.cultural_note: Orienting someone by referencing the opposite main entrance is a common local shortcut.

likely_response.local: Rovně přes halu, naproti hlavnímu vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: Straight through the hall, opposite the main entrance.

responses.english: Straight through the hall, opposite the main entrance.
responses.local: Rovně přes halu, naproti hlavnímu vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: How do I validate my platform ticket?
phrases.text_local: Jak si mám označit jízdenku na nástupišti?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket validation machines are typically mounted on posts at platform entrances.

likely_response.local: Zastrčte ji do žlutého strojku na sloupku.
likely_response.translation_en: Insert it into the yellow machine on the post.

responses.english: Insert it into the yellow machine on the post.
responses.local: Zastrčte ji do žlutého strojku na sloupku.

phrases.cultural_note: It's common to reference the main street entrance for orientation.

likely_response.local: U vchodu z Fügnerovy ulice vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the Fügnerova street entrance on the left.

responses.english: At the Fügnerova street entrance on the left.
responses.local: U vchodu z Fügnerovy ulice vlevo.

phrases.intent_en: Is there a luggage storage service?
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage storage at bus stations is often located in the connecting underpass.

likely_response.local: Ano, dole v podchodu pod nástupišti.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, downstairs in the underpass beneath the platforms.

responses.english: Yes, downstairs in the underpass beneath the platforms.
responses.local: Ano, dole v podchodu pod nástupišti.
